calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Plaintiffs Danilo Galban and Myra Galban are present.
Michael Hall appearing for the plaintiffs.

Defendant Murdies Bobbie Washington is present.
Patrick Zhang and Caroline Patton representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The parties enter into a sign agreement, which was filed. See scanned document for the settlement terms contained in the signed agreement for the premises located on 250 Leland Avenues, San Francisco, California 94134.

The trial date of December 15, 2008 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Form Interrogatories; Request For Production Of Documents;Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Dec-10-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Murdies Bobbie Washington, defendant and opposing party in Propria Persona

No other appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories (unlawful detainer), special interrogatories, and request for production of documents is ordered off calendar. A hearsay proof of personal service is not competent evidence that the motion was served. The proof of personal service must be signed by the person who actually served the motion. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.
